title: Places caption candidate record
description: One JSONL line produced by external Claude Code / Codex analysis of an exported caption batch. Copy post_id, input_hash, and analysis_version verbatim from the exported line — they pin the result to the exact analysis input and version, and the importer rejects the line if the post changed since export. Candidates are strictly textual: never include coordinates, a provider, a providerPlaceId, or a precision. Coordinates are added later by the server-side geographic resolver only.

post_id.description: The exported post id this analysis belongs to.

input_hash.description: Immutable SHA-256 (lowercase hex) of the analysis input, copied unchanged from the exported line. The importer recomputes it and rejects the record if it no longer matches the post's current state.

analysis_version.description: Analysis pipeline version, copied unchanged from the exported line. It is the single source of truth used to recompute the hash and to create the analysis job.
